falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5500 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would indicate a bullish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score drops below 30 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score below 30 would indicate reduced volatility/momentum, invalidating the current 'HOLD' by showing the market is no longer in a high-pressure phase characteristic of a blowoff top.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% and holds for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a move would signal strong risk-on sentiment and economic strength, directly contradicting the implied bearishness of the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern and invalidating the current unknown verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
